title: Add Multiples of Ten
description: Add two numbers that are multiples of ten by combining their tens.
condition: Addition expression where both addends are multiples of 10 (e.g., 70 + 20).
response: Add the tens to get the total (e.g., 7 tens + 2 tens = 9 tens → 90).
label: Principle / Model

title: Compare Two-Digit Numbers
description: Determine whether one two-digit number is greater than, less than, or equal to another by comparing place values.
condition: Two two-digit numbers with a blank comparison symbol between them.
response: Write >, <, or = based on comparing tens first, then ones if needed.
label: Principle / Model
example: $35 < 53$ because $3$ tens is less than $5$ tens.

title: Read Analog Clock to the Half Hour
description: Determine the time shown on an analog clock when the minute hand is at the 6.
condition: Analog clock with minute hand pointing to 6 and hour hand between two numbers.
response: State the time as half past the previous hour (e.g., 3:30).
label: Principle / Model
example: If the minute hand is on $6$ and the hour hand is between $3$ and $4$, the time is $3{:}30$.

title: Subtract Multiples of Ten
description: Subtract one multiple of ten from another by subtracting their tens.
condition: Subtraction expression where both numbers are multiples of 10 (e.g., 90 − 40).
response: Subtract the tens to get the result (e.g., 9 tens − 4 tens = 5 tens → 50).
label: Principle / Model
